title: Armor Eraser
description: Modifies held player armor to be invisible while wearing.
body:
Minecraft data pack to make player armor invisible when wearing. ### Erase Armor 1. Hold a piece of player armor in your mainhand. 2. Do one of the following: 1. Press G and select `Armor Eraser` to view in game menu. Then select `Erase Armor`. 2. Run `/trigger ae_erase`.
### Un-Erase Armor 1. Hold a piece of player armor in your mainhand. 2. Do one of the following: 1. Press G and select `Armor Eraser` to view in game menu. Then select `Un-Erase Armor`. 2. Run `/trigger ae_unerase`.
### Gallery Before Armor Eraser
After Armor Eraser
In Game Menu
### **Note:** This datapack has only been tested with Vanilla player armor. Trying to use this for custom armor may lead to undesired reesults.
